title: MY BOT WORKS 🫠
author: FinancialGuru19
selftext: I finally made a trading bot that works. The first day I had to tweak it a lot because of tp and sl placements not working. After that I worked beautifully. In the future I want to make this into a multi trading bot that can do gold and mnq trades at the same time. 😊 I might post a GitHub repo on data and backtesting since the bottleneck right now is backtesting I can only get 90 days worth of backtesting with yfinance

comments.author: Worth_Necessary_4418
comments.body: Tiene buenas pinta sii, te recomiendo q lo tengas como 6 meses mínimo en modo real, sin backstesting ni papeles ni nada similar, solo eso te dará la confianza, enhorabuena✌️✌️✌️

replies.author: FinancialGuru19
replies.body: This is real money with my real brokerage account. This isn’t paper. But yea that’s what I’m thinking about doing. This will be the first week that I’ll let it run without touching anything and let the bot do its thing

replies.author: Worth_Necessary_4418
replies.body: Perfecto me alegro mucho y espero que salga de lujo, acuérdate que nada es infalible y que tendrás días malos, solo no bajes la guardia esos días y empieces a trastocar todo, si la estrategia es buena, todo volverá a su cauce, te lo digo por experiencia jejej, saludos y congrats

replies.author: FinancialGuru19
replies.body: You have your own trading bot?

replies.author: Worth_Necessary_4418
replies.body:
Sii, puedes pegar un vistazo a www.mazingerv1.com 
Quizás ves algo que te guste para implementar en tu sistema o quizás me das alguna idea de mejora para el mio, mi sistema de momento solo está en habla hispana, estoy trabajando en las traducciones.

comments.author: Marchese_QuantLab
comments.body: Great job man, if you interested i have 10 years ticks already clean and ready to go for your research. Let me know

replies.author: Marchese_QuantLab
replies.body: And by the way i have 3 bot running , that i have tested on those 10 years data. They work great
